calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2014 Set For Trial On Apr-28-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 502

SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Apr-29-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Bryndis Tobin, ESQ. for Appellants/ Defendants
Scott Erickson and Ryan Erickson
with witness Taylor Fredricks

Katherine Roberts, Respondent / Plaintiff
with witness James Dyer
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.
Katherine Roberts testifies on her own behalf. The following exhibits are introduced:
1. Two Pictures of front of building
2. Group of Invoices
3. Lease
4. pictures of damages
5.Tenants response re Move Out
6. April 2, 2012 move out notice from the Ericksons.
7. Receipt of Key letter from attorney
8. Partial Itemized check list of damages dated May 2, 2012
9. Completed itemized check list of damages dated May 14, 2012
10. Additions to Walkthrough check list
11. Real Estate notice SOLD
12. copy of current value
13. Deed

Bryndis Tobin testifies on behalf of the appellant/ defendant
A binder containing all appellant / defendants' exhibits is submitted.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
